$comment: Swarm & Bee · The organic dataset bakery · public menu manifest. Machine-readable inventory. See https://bakery.swarmandbee.ai for the human-readable surface.

bakery.name: Swarm & Bee · CCIR · Commercial Compute Intelligence Refinery
bakery.doctrine: AI is a bakery first. Signal is supply. Curators are bakers. Distribution is delivery. Fresh every day, with a shelf life. 500 fantastic muffins crush 25,000 ingredients.

by_the_pound.description: Bulk curated training corpora. Graded, deduped, freshness-stamped. Sold per 1,000 pairs. For shops with a base model and a need for breadth.
by_the_pound.delivery: tarball + manifest.json + per-batch sha256 + optional Hedera anchor

stock.name: sb-aviation
stock.note: Raw, not yet audited. Prior cook had 8,497 ASRS think-tag leakage incidents (quarantined). Not currently for sale; available on request once audited.

the_500_pack.description: 500-1,000 pairs hand-built around one failure mode. Each pair carries failure_source + repair_goal metadata. Tribunal-sealed before delivery. 25-50× the leverage of equivalent wholesale.
the_500_pack.pricing_model: fixed-price per pack — scoped on intake
the_500_pack.delivery: JSONL corpus + scoping memo + Tribunal seal + sha256 manifest + optional cook-for-you on owned Blackwell silicon

starter_kits.name: fabrication_detection_500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting fabrication detection at honey-grade confidence (the Curator-v2 blind spot). Trains a model to flag confident hallucinations, not just hedge.

starter_kits.name: math_verification_500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting numeric claim verification — cap rate, DSCR, IRR derivation, sensitivity grids. Refusal patterns when inputs are insufficient.

starter_kits.name: recommendation_alignment_500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting text/decision alignment. Does the IC memo's recommendation match the analysis? Curator-v3 audit shape.

starter_kits.name: patient_comm_500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting medical-jargon-to-plain-language rewrite, consent explanation, triage script generation.

starter_kits.name: contract_risk_flag_500
starter_kits.description: 500 pairs targeting unusual-term flagging, indemnification scope checks, termination-condition extraction.

sample_packs.description: Free taste tests. Same provenance shape as a full delivery — see the quality bar before you order. Each pack includes at least one PROPOLIS-grade pair (labeled) so you see what we filter out, not just what we ship.

ordering.cli_install: pip install swarmbee-bakery   # planned, post Atlas-70B v1

provenance.certification: Outputs trained on Swarm & Bee corpora may carry the defendable.eth mark. See https://defendable.eth.limo
